Turn any browser interaction into a ready-to-run automated test instantly.

Nimbal User Journey is a browser extension that records everything you do on a website: your clicks, inputs, and navigation. In the background, it generates automation-ready Cucumber/Gherkin steps, precise test locators, and a full video of your journey so you can go from manual flow to repeatable automation without writing a single line of script by hand.

🎬 Record. Generate. Automate.

Hit record, perform your flow on any website or web app, and stop. That's it. Nimbal User Journey captures:

✅ Cucumber/Gherkin feature steps — structured, automation-ready, copy-paste-ready
✅ CSS selectors and XPath locators — extracted automatically from every interaction
✅ A full video recording — for review, sharing, sign-off, or documentation
✅ A complete audit trail — every click, input, and navigation captured in sequence

No more hand-writing test scripts. No more hunting for element locators. No more video screen recording on the side.

⚡ Built for Every Role on Your Team

👨‍💻 Developers
Bring recorded journeys directly into the Automation Web IDE inside Nimbal Tree. Paste into a feature file, refine, and run. Once recorded, sign up at Nimbal Tree, open the Automation Web IDE, paste your journey into a feature file, and run your automation in minutes. Faster test-first development, less boilerplate.

🧪 Testers & QA Engineers
Record real user flows from a real browser. Review and validate generated steps. Once your journey is captured, take it straight into the Automation Web IDE to build and run repeatable test scenarios without starting from scratch. Skip the tedious parts of test creation and focus on coverage and quality.

💼 Business Analysts & Product Owners
Record the actual journey once. Share the video and Gherkin steps with your team. Pass the recorded output directly to developers or use it as input for Nimbal Autopilot to execute real business flows with no extra setup. Bridge the gap between business scenarios and technical automation.

🙌 Non-Technical Users
Use your recorded flow as direct input into Nimbal Autopilot. Paste the steps, add a simple prompt, and let Autopilot execute the browser flow for you. No coding, no configuration — just record and pass it across.

🔁 Two Paths to Automation

Once you've recorded your journey, take it further inside Nimbal Tree — no credit card required to sign up:

🖥️ Automation Web IDE
Structured, code-level automation for developers and QA engineers. Paste your generated feature file, run your scenario, and build reliable regression suites faster.

🤖 Nimbal Autopilot
Natural-language browser automation for everyone. Paste your Gherkin steps or describe actions in plain English. Autopilot handles the rest — opening URLs, filling forms, clicking elements, capturing screenshots.

You can also use your recorded steps with AI tools to generate Playwright, Selenium, or other framework scripts — even outside the Nimbal ecosystem entirely.

📋 Example Output

After recording a login flow, you get:

Feature: Internet herokuapp Login
Scenario: Internet herokuapp Login
Given I open url https://the-internet.herokuapp.com/login
When I fill input Username with value tomsmith
# selector: #username
# xpath: //*[@id='username']
And I fill input Password with value SuperSecretPassword!
# selector: label=Password
# xpath: //*[@id='login']/div[2]/div[1]/input[1]
And I click element Login
# selector: role=button[name="Login"]
# xpath: //button[normalize-space()='Login']

Locators and steps generated automatically. Ready to paste and run.

🚀 Get Started in Minutes

1️⃣ Install the extension and click the Nimbal icon
2️⃣ Hit Record and perform your flow on any website
3️⃣ Stop recording — collect your Gherkin steps, locators, and video
4️⃣ Sign up free at https://tree.nimbal.co.nz/
5️⃣ Choose Automation Web IDE or Autopilot and run your automation

📖 Getting Started Guide: https://nimbalai.nimbal.co.nz/getting-started#user-journey
🎥 Watch a demo: https://res.cloudinary.com/ddzva0bvk/video/upload/v1776407759/NIMBAL_USER_JOURNEY_REC_kbfsyx.mp4

🏆 Why Teams Choose Nimbal User Journey

Cuts hours of manual script writing to minutes. Keeps developers, testers, and business users working from the same recorded source of truth. Produces video documentation alongside automation artifacts in a single recording session. Works on any website or web application with no configuration needed. Connects directly to a full automation platform when you're ready to scale.

⏹️ Stop writing. ▶️ Start recording.

Sign up free at https://tree.nimbal.co.nz/

Record screen, tabs, or custom areas with audio. Edit and trim recordings. Fast, private, and watermark-free.

ScreenGo is a modern, powerful, and easy-to-use screen recording extension for Chrome. Whether you need to record tutorials, gameplay, meetings, or bug reports, ScreenGo has you covered with its versatile recording modes and high-performance area selection tool.

✨ Key Features:

🎥 Versatile Recording Modes
Record your entire screen, a specific application window, or just a Chrome tab.

📐 High-Performance Area Selection
Zero-latency area cropping. Simply drag to select the exact area you want to record.

🎵 Full Audio Support
Record system audio and microphone input simultaneously. Perfect for creating narrated tutorials or recording online meetings.

✂️ Video Trimming & Preview
Preview your recording immediately and use the built-in trimmer to keep only the best parts.

💾 Multi-Format Export
Export your recordings as WebM or MP4 files, ready for sharing on any platform.

🎨 Modern & Clean UI
A beautiful, responsive control panel that can be dragged anywhere on your screen, ensuring it never gets in your way.

🌍 Privacy First
All recordings are processed locally on your computer. No data is ever sent to the cloud.

How to use:
1. Click the ScreenGo icon in your toolbar.
2. Choose to record the current page (with area selection), window, or full screen.
3. Toggle system audio or microphone as needed.
4. Click "Start Recording".
5. After recording, preview, trim, and export as WebM or MP4.

GitHub Repository:
https://github.com/hiawui/screengo

リアルタイム音声文字起こし＆TranslateGemmaによるローカル翻訳

Gemstream はタブの音声をキャプチャし、リアルタイムで文字起こし・翻訳を行う Chrome 拡張機能です。

音声認識（Whisper）と翻訳（TranslateGemma 4B）のAI推論はすべて WebGPU を活用してブラウザ内で実行されます。音声やテキストが外部サーバーに送信されることは一切ないため、社内動画や機密性の高いコンテンツにも安心してご利用いただけます。

主な特徴：
  ・リアルタイムの音声文字起こしと翻訳をパネルに表示
  ・56言語に対応
  ・完全ローカル処理 — データがブラウザの外に出ない
  ・WebGPU による高速な推論
  ・ワンクリックでモデルセットアップ

動作要件：
  ・Chrome 113 以降
  ・WebGPU 対応 GPU
  ・初回モデルダウンロードに約3GBのストレージ

使い方：
  1. 拡張機能アイコンをクリックしてパネルを表示
  2. ソース言語とターゲット言語を選択
  3.「Start」をクリックし、キャプチャするタブを選択
  3. 文字起こしと翻訳がリアルタイムで表示されます

社内動画、海外ウェビナー、外国語の動画コンテンツなど、プライバシーを重視した環境での翻訳に最適です。

Capture regions, full screen, and seamless scrolling long screenshots.

# SnapLet - Element & Area Screenshot Tool

**Capture any web element or drag-to-select region in one click.**

SnapLet is a powerful Chrome extension that revolutionizes how you capture screenshots on the web. Whether you need to grab a specific element, select a custom area, or document web content for presentations, SnapLet makes it effortless and precise.

## 🚀 Why Choose SnapLet?

### **Precision at Your Fingertips**
- **Element-Perfect Capture**: Hover over any web element to highlight it, then right-click to capture exactly what you need
- **Custom Area Selection**: Drag to select any rectangular region on the page with pixel-perfect accuracy
- **No More Cropping**: Say goodbye to taking full-page screenshots and manually cropping them later

### **Streamlined Workflow**
- **One-Click Operation**: Enable the tool once, then capture multiple elements without reopening the extension
- **Instant Downloads**: Screenshots are automatically saved to your Downloads folder with timestamped filenames
- **Visual Feedback**: Real-time highlighting shows exactly what will be captured before you click

### **Professional Quality**
- **High-Resolution Output**: Captures elements at their native resolution for crisp, clear images
- **Clean Boundaries**: Automatically detects element boundaries for perfect framing
- **Consistent Results**: Every screenshot maintains the original quality and formatting

## 🎯 Perfect For

### **Web Developers & Designers**
- Document UI components and design elements
- Create visual bug reports with precise element captures
- Build design systems and component libraries
- Capture responsive design variations

### **Content Creators & Marketers**
- Create tutorials and how-to guides
- Document user interfaces for presentations
- Capture social media posts and web content
- Build visual documentation and reports

### **Researchers & Students**
- Document web-based research findings
- Capture data visualizations and charts
- Create visual citations and references
- Build comprehensive web content archives

### **Quality Assurance & Testing**
- Document software bugs with precise screenshots
- Create test case documentation
- Capture different states of web applications
- Build visual regression test suites

## ✨ Key Features

### **🎯 Element Screenshot Mode**
- **Smart Highlighting**: Hover over any element to see exactly what will be captured
- **Right-Click Capture**: Simple right-click context menu integration
- **Automatic Detection**: Intelligently identifies clickable elements, images, text blocks, and containers
- **Boundary Recognition**: Captures complete elements including padding and borders

### **📐 Area Screenshot Mode**
- **Drag-to-Select**: Click and drag to select any rectangular area
- **Visual Selection Box**: Real-time preview of the selected area
- **Flexible Sizing**: Select areas as small as a few pixels or as large as the entire viewport
- **Confirmation Controls**: Press Enter to confirm or ESC to cancel selection

### **🌍 Multi-Language Support**
- **4 Languages**: English, Chinese (Simplified), French, and Japanese
- **Localized Interface**: All tooltips and messages in your preferred language
- **Automatic Detection**: Uses your browser's language settings by default

### **⌨️ Intuitive Controls**
- **ESC to Exit**: Double-tap ESC key to quickly exit any mode
- **Visual Hints**: On-screen instructions guide you through each step
- **Keyboard Shortcuts**: Efficient workflow with minimal mouse clicks

### **🔧 Advanced Technology**
- **Chrome DevTools Integration**: Uses Chrome's native screenshot API for maximum quality
- **Memory Efficient**: Lightweight design that doesn't slow down your browsing
- **Cross-Site Compatible**: Works on any website, including complex web applications

## 🚀 Getting Started

### **Installation**
1. Install SnapLet from the Chrome Web Store
2. Click the SnapLet icon in your browser toolbar
3. Choose your preferred capture mode
4. Start capturing!

### **Element Screenshot**
1. Click "Element Screenshot" in the popup
2. Hover over any web element to highlight it
3. Right-click and select "📸 Capture This Element"
4. Your screenshot is automatically saved!

### **Area Screenshot**
1. Click "Area Screenshot" in the popup
2. Click and drag to select your desired area
3. Press Enter to confirm or ESC to cancel
4. Your custom area screenshot is saved!

## 💡 Pro Tips

### **Maximize Your Efficiency**
- **Batch Capturing**: Enable element mode once, then capture multiple elements without reopening
- **Precise Selection**: Use area mode for capturing specific portions of complex layouts
- **Quick Exit**: Double-tap ESC to quickly exit any mode and return to normal browsing

### **Best Practices**
- **Wait for Load**: Ensure pages are fully loaded before capturing for best results
- **Check Highlights**: Verify the highlight covers your intended element before right-clicking
- **Use Area Mode**: For elements that don't highlight properly, use area selection instead

## 🔒 Privacy & Security

- **No Data Collection**: SnapLet doesn't collect, store, or transmit any personal data
- **Local Processing**: All screenshot processing happens locally in your browser
- **Minimal Permissions**: Only requests necessary permissions for screenshot functionality
- **Open Source Ready**: Clean, auditable codebase for transparency

## 🆚 Why SnapLet vs. Other Tools?

### **Compared to Built-in Browser Tools**
- ✅ **Element-specific capture** vs. ❌ Full page screenshots only
- ✅ **One-click operation** vs. ❌ Multiple steps required
- ✅ **Visual highlighting** vs. ❌ Guesswork selection

### **Compared to Other Extensions**
- ✅ **Dual capture modes** vs. ❌ Single functionality
- ✅ **Native quality** vs. ❌ Compressed outputs
- ✅ **Multi-language support** vs. ❌ English only
- ✅ **Lightweight design** vs. ❌ Resource-heavy alternatives

### **Compared to External Tools**
- ✅ **Browser integration** vs. ❌ Separate applications
- ✅ **Instant capture** vs. ❌ Import/export workflows
- ✅ **Free to use** vs. ❌ Subscription costs

## 🎉 Join Thousands of Satisfied Users

*"SnapLet has completely changed how I document web interfaces. The element highlighting is incredibly accurate, and the one-click capture saves me hours every week."* - **Sarah M., UX Designer**

*"As a QA engineer, I need to capture specific UI elements for bug reports. SnapLet makes this process effortless and the quality is always perfect."* - **David L., QA Engineer**

*"The area selection feature is a game-changer for creating tutorials. I can capture exactly what I need without any post-processing."* - **Maria R., Content Creator**

## 🔄 Regular Updates

SnapLet is actively maintained with regular updates including:
- New feature additions based on user feedback
- Performance optimizations and bug fixes
- Compatibility updates for latest Chrome versions
- Enhanced language support and localization

## 📞 Support & Feedback

We're committed to making SnapLet the best screenshot tool for Chrome users. Your feedback helps us improve!

---

**Ready to transform your screenshot workflow?**

**[Install SnapLet Now](chrome-web-store-link)** and experience the difference that precision and simplicity can make in your daily web interactions.

A Chrome extension for managing Gmail unsubscribe actions

SpamTracker: Protect Your Inbox and Claim Your Rights
Stop spam and take control of your inbox with SpamTracker—a simple extension that helps you monitor email compliance and claim compensation for violations.

Key Features:
Track Unsubscribes: Record proof when you unsubscribe from unwanted emails.
Get Alerts: Stay notified if a company violates GDPR, CAN-SPAM, or similar laws.
Claim Compensation: File claims and receive up to $500 per violation.

How It Works:
Install the Extension: Add SpamTracker to Chrome.
Record Unsubscribes: Document the unsubscription process in one click.
Monitor Compliance: Track which companies follow the rules.
Claim Violations: File a claim with our help and get compensation.

Why Choose SpamTracker?
Protect Your Rights: Ensure companies respect your privacy.
Stay Organized: Keep track of unsubscribed companies and evidence.
Simple and Secure: Easy setup with full privacy protection.

Vibe with your creativity!

Introducing PixelVibe Recorder for Chrome: Unleash Your Creativity and Productivity with Seamless Video Capture.

Are you ready to take your web recording and content creation to the next level? PixelVibe Chrome Recorder is here to revolutionize the way you capture and share your digital experiences. With PixelVibe, we've combined cutting-edge technology with an effortless user experience to help you save time, express your creativity, and boost your productivity.

Capture Anything, Anytime, Anywhere:

PixelVibe empowers you to capture the full spectrum of your digital world. Whether it's a specific browser tab, an entire window, or your entire screen, our recorder seamlessly captures it all. You're not limited to just what's on your screen; PixelVibe also records crystal-clear audio and video from your webcam, so you can effortlessly integrate your own personal touch into your recordings.

High-Quality Output, Effortless Download:

PixelVibe doesn't just capture, it delivers your content in top-notch quality. Your recordings can be easily saved in both the efficient and lightweight WebP format or the widely compatible MP4 format. No need for complicated export settings; just one click, and your recording is ready to download, saving you valuable time for what truly matters – creating and sharing.

One-Click Download:

We understand that simplicity and convenience matter, so we've made it as easy as possible for you. With PixelVibe, you can download your recordings with a single click. No more hassle searching through menus or waiting for lengthy rendering processes. Just click, and your content is in your hands.

Fast and Easy Sign-Up with Google:

Time is precious, and we don't want you to waste a second. PixelVibe offers fast and convenient sign-up using your Google account. No lengthy forms, no password hassles – just one click to authenticate, and you're in. It's the quickest path to unlocking the full potential of PixelVibe.

Unleash Your Creativity:

PixelVibe is more than just a recorder; it's your canvas for creative expression. Whether you're a content creator, educator, business professional, or simply someone who loves to share experiences, PixelVibe empowers you to bring your ideas to life. Create engaging tutorials, immersive presentations, captivating gameplay videos, or heartfelt vlogs – the possibilities are endless.

Boost Productivity with Seamless Workflow:

PixelVibe integrates seamlessly into your Chrome browser, ensuring a smooth workflow. No need to switch between applications or wrestle with complicated settings. With PixelVibe's intuitive interface and single-click download, you can focus on your tasks and projects without any distractions.

Stay at the Cutting Edge:

We're committed to keeping PixelVibe at the forefront of technology. Our team constantly updates and improves our recorder to provide you with the latest features and enhancements. With PixelVibe, you're always on the cutting edge, ready to adapt to the ever-evolving digital landscape.

PixelVibe Chrome Recorder is your key to a more efficient, creative, and productive digital experience. Capture, create, and share your world effortlessly with our user-friendly interface, high-quality output options, and seamless Google Sign-in authentication. Say goodbye to time-consuming processes and hello to the future of digital content creation with PixelVibe. Try it today and experience the difference for yourself.
